review_title: The gold standard for writer and editors
description: Our experience with Grammarly has been great till now. We have been using the business plan since 2018 and it works best for us. There are 8 people in our team that use this.
author: Ashish S.
pros: I write SOP (statement of purpose) for students taking admissions in Ivy League colleges. Grammarly is my go to app while doing editing. After writing, I go to grammarly and paste or upload the entire document and it shows me the overall quality of the write up. The UI is simply awesome and shows everything in a summary.
cons: So we are a team of 8 people and we mostly use Grammarly for editing our docs. Although we are very used to this software but sometimes it shows unnecessary underlines on the phrases which are already well written. This is a little annoying and irritating as it hampers the overall score of the write up.

review_title: Effective Writing Tool for Teams
description: My overall experience with Grammarly Business was positive, as it improved writing quality and team collaboration, despite its cost.
author: Lucky O.
pros: I like that Grammarly Business enhances team communication with advanced writing suggestions and consistency tools.
cons: I least liked that Grammarly Business can be expensive for small teams and sometimes suggests overly formal corrections.

review_title: Great Spellcheck across all platforms
description: As a Dyslexic person, I relay heavily on spell-check features. I use Grammarly almost every day. Although I appreciate the ease of use, I would like it if Grammarly was a bit stronger in spell check and not as pushy to upgrade services and change the tone of writing.
author: Grace T.
pros: I really love how Grammarly helps with spellcheck. I heavily reply on their spell check feature and love how Grammarly can help across on writing platforms.
cons: There are a lot of words which I spell incorrectly and Grammarly doesn't know what I am trying to spell so it doesn't have any suggestions. I with that the Word guess feature was stronger. I also don't like how Grammarly is constantly trying to get me to upgrade by showing a colorful line under my writing then suggesting I upgrade to have Grammerly fix it. I have also noticed that a lot of their "suggested reviews" change the tone of what I have written.

review_title: Easy Team Writing: Routine, Professional Results.
description: I have had a positive experience with Grammarly Business. It has enhanced clarity, professionalism and consistency of team communication significantly. The instantaneous grammatical, tone and readability recommendations make the writing process more effective and lessen the necessity of using the manual proofreading. I also found it particularly helpful in terms of ensuring that it has a consistent brand voice in various teams because it provides a style guide and tone options. Its integrations with common and daily work tools such as email and document platforms imply that it can easily be integrated into daily workflow with minimal disturbance. Although there are a few mistakes in the recommendations and a certain level of lag in the performance, the problems are small compared to the benefits. It has assisted in saving time, boosting confidence in writing, as well as enhancing the standard of internal and external communication. In general, it is an effective team-building resource that enables teams to write and collaborate.
author: Harishyam D.
pros: The most attractive feature to me of Grammarly Business is that it is easy to improve communication within the team in real-time. Its fast and accurate grammar and clarity suggestions ensure that it is not difficult to produce a clean, business-style content. The tone detection feature comes in handy to ensure that communications sound acceptable and effective. Another thing I appreciate is the style guide tools, which help the brand voice to remain consistent across teams. It is easy to operate on a daily basis since it smooths interfaces with emails, browsers and documents. In a nutshell, it enhances communication in the firm, writing quality and saves on time.
cons: The weakness of Grammarly Business is that the proposals are too pushy or they are not contextual to certain contextual writing, particularly technical or creative. It can suggest amendments that will change intended meaning or tone. Smaller teams can also be worried with the premium pricing. Also, there are some lag or performance-related problems in some integrations that can break workflow. Finally, its sophisticated capabilities such as style guides might need some initial set up and training to be comprehensive.

review_title: Grammarly will save you
description: I'd say it's the best; I'd give it 8/10. It has its ups and downs, but it helps me with my captions for social media.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like that it helps to improve my writing. It enables me to set the tone I want, whether it's friendly or entertaining. I'd say it's easier than most editing software.
cons: I wish that I didn't need to upgrade to PRO to fix certain parts of my writing. There are moments when I need extra help, and I have to pay for it.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A Reliable Tool for Professional, Error-Free Writing
description: Overall, my experience with Grammarly Business has been very positive. It has significantly improved the quality and professionalism of my writing while saving time on editing. It’s a reliable tool for content creation, emails, and business communication.
author: Shristi M.
pros: Grammarly Business is very easy to use and helps improve writing quality instantly. I especially like the clarity and engagement suggestions, which make content more professional. It’s also helpful for team collaboration, ensuring consistent communication across all content.
cons: The pricing can be a bit high, especially for small teams or individuals. Sometimes the suggestions feel repetitive or not fully aligned with the intended tone.

review_title: Grammarly is the best
description: It is so useful, and I do not have any alternative to it, for typing correction and fast language editing.
author: Samer A.
pros: Grammarly is great and so useful when integrated with the Google Chrome browser; it is so helpful to correct typos and improve the context.
cons: It is good overall, and I am happy to use Grammarly, but to further optimize then language detection and translation can be included and expanded.

review_title: Powerful yet still expensive
description: Not bad, great at getting things done quickly and catches grammar/spelling mistakes. Love the suggestions.
author: Adel M.
pros: Real-time fixes for grammar/spelling/clarity save tons of time; especially for quick emails and docs. Love the brand voice feature to keep everything consistent across the team. Integrates everywhere (Google Docs, Slack, etc.), and the AI rewrites/drafts aligned to our tone make writing faster and more pro. Game-changer for clear, polished comms without the hassle.
cons: The price is pretty steep—especially for smaller teams or if you're not using every feature, it feels like overkill compared to the individual premium version. Sometimes the suggestions overcorrect or miss nuance in tone/brand voice even with custom setups, making AI rewrites sound a bit generic or off. Occasional integration glitches (like lag in certain tools or not playing nice with online editors) force copy-pasting, which kills the flow. And yeah, it can pop up too much or suggest changes that just aren't needed if you're already solid at writing.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Best writing assistant for processional use
description: Overall my experience with Grammarly Business is very positive. It helps saves time, efforts and reduce grammar mistakes and it is best for daily reliable business communication.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Grammarly Bussiness makes writing easier and cleaner for professional usage. I like that it offers instant suggestions for correct grammer, tone and clarity while i type and helps to learn use to correct grammer. Plagarism checker and team features are very useful to maintain the consistent communication within the team. Its customer support is very fast and suppotive. It uses aws file storage for the uploading any file to checking grammer. Its best value for money website to get grammar correct
cons: Sometimes suggestions are very irritating for causal conversation. It becomes more expensive for small team. Their suggestion feel too strict while general conversation.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Grammarly to write correctly
description: Overall its a great platform, with a great wordi g database, perfect for all forms of writings and communication. Super easy to use
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Grammarly is a great new way to communicate without loosing time into corrections or content check. It gives great word and texting suggeestions.
cons: I dont use the system too often. I would say, it might get addictive, as it will practically start writing and working for you.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Grammarly: Master of Fluency with Error Free communication
description: As I using grammarly from past 8-9 month. I am personally feel very satisfied by feature of grammarly except the restriction of many important tools in free mode . It save my time in many ways by correcting sentence and suggesting also .After using these fluency and confidence of speaking is improved.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: As Grammarly improves fluency and tone of language, which meet the need of professions. If any sentences is in error then it get Recheck by grammarly and suggest the better sentence of writing and by these error of mistake is not there .
cons: A features by grammarly is restricted in open or free version . Many of the tools have locked and so I don't use that features

review_title: Grammarly Business: Reforming Group Coordinated effort and Composing Quality
description: The prompt criticism on language, accentuation, and style assists you with rapidly adjusting botches and work on your composition, saving important time. It lifts the nature of business archives by recommending enhancements that make your composing more clear, more compact, and expert.: The common style guides and group explicit composing norms are unquestionably helpful for keeping up with consistency across your group's interchanges.
author: Jamuna J.
pros: Grammarly is a composing device that is eminent at discovering spelling and accentuation blunders. It likewise gives ideas to minor composing enhancements. Nonetheless, a few clients find its style ideas less valuable. In general, it has a positive rating from clients. It gives important bits of knowledge into your group's composing execution, distinguishing regions for development. The capacity to modify ideas and reconciliations as indicated by your particular requirements makes it a flexible device.
cons: While it's typically awesome, there are occasions where the ideas made by Grammarly can be excessively unbending or not completely setting proper, in some cases affecting the regular progression of composing.

review_title: Grammarly can be a life saver
description: My overall experience with Grammarly Business has been fairly positive. It's a highly effective tool for improving communication and maintaining a professional consistency through its custom style guides and real time suggestions. It saves time and elevates the quality of my professional writing.
author: John R.
pros: Grammarly Business excels at ensuring consistent communication across a team. The custom style guide and tone detection features are highly effective in maintaining a unified voice, which is crucial for professional correspondence.
cons: Grammarly's suggestions can sometimes be overly prescriptive, sacrificing unique text for automated perfection. It can also miss certain nuances and context-specific errors.

review_title: Indispensable Tool For Writing
description: The experience has been great! It is a very powerful tool if you produce a lot of typed documents.
author: James G.
pros: I have been using for over a year and produce a lot of sermons and Sunday school lessons. Grammarly does as the name implies it checks and helps adjust my grammar with intelligent suggestions based on the mood and tone I am trying f to achieve.
cons: Sometimes in Microsoft word it does not make the changes even when I say yes make the changes. This may be due to the version of Mac OS word I am using.

review_title: Grammer tools for students, and adults
description: Overall, I like this app, and currently, I am using this app not only to write essays but also to send messages or emailing teachers.
author: Hyeyoung J.
pros: I liked it when writing my long essay, such as 4000 words. By writing many essays, sometimes there a grammar mistakes problem which I couldn't see. However, by using this app, I can find it more easily to correct my grammar mistakes.
cons: Sometimes, I can find out the meaning of the entire sentence is different, so I have to rewrite the sentence again.

review_title: Great for people with dyslexia
description: Overall the app function is great for people with dyslexia or even lack proper writing skills, and if I still had a need for it I would still be using it
author: Dalton W.
pros: Grammarly is a dream for a person like me with dyslexia it helps me in real time with spelling and punctuation or even let me know of better way to communicate a sentence your writing.
cons: The only negative I have is that when I no longer needed it I canceled it and then got billed for it twice and had to get with customer service each time to resolve the issue thankfully they were able to give me refunds

review_title: Useful writing assistance for academic teams.
description: It’s improved the caliber of our academic materials and supported new hires in their efforts to maintain a consistent communication standard throughout the organization.
author: Austin R.
pros: Grammarly Business has helped us out a lot in keeping communication professional. I enjoy that it automatically curtails tone and formality without breaking my writing flow.
cons: Some of the advanced recommendations can appear a bit stilted even if you’re trying to whip up an informal announcement that should be more of a personal voice.

review_title: Forever the best tool for grammar correction
description: Grammarly helped me as a freelancer writer even before the advent of AI for text generation I was able to use grammarly for plagiarism checks and it does it flawlessly
author: Babatunde O.
pros: The AI writing is superb and I like the fact that they kept the originality of grammarly which was basically for correcting grammar and not another AI writer
cons: The AI detector is giving false positives and I hope grammarly can take a look at this and take action.

review_title: My Grammarly experience
description: It's amazing and worth every penny spent on a subscription. The infusion of their AI makes it even more fantastic
author: Charles E.
pros: The ease of structuring and putting my sentences rightly at every step of the way
cons: I haven't had any downtime with Grammarly Business.

review_title: Resisted for a long time and wish I hadn't
description: This has become a critical tool for our department's business writing. I have opted to let it integrate into my email compositions as well.
author: Mary C.
pros: Using the AI detector is easy and helpful. I also didn't realize how many small grammatical errors had become habitual in my business writing and this program has helped point those out.
cons: The features are a bit hard to understand and organize. Most frequently, the features used are the most simple like AI detection, content clarity, grammatical correctness, etc.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Keeps writing clean
description: Grammarly Business helps keep reports and mails cleaner without needing to spend ages checking over every bit.
author: Luke H.
pros: What’s good is it spots more than just spelling—tone, bits that don’t read smooth, all that. Stays out the way mostly, but gives a nudge when it counts.
cons: Sometimes it pushes too hard though. Flags stuff that was fine, or suggests changes that make the text feel too polished, like it’s lost its voice.

review_title: Real review from graduate student and office manager
description: Overall, it is great for people who are not native in English, especially struggling with grammar. I was using Grammarly since I was in high school, and it helped me a lot through nowadays.
author: Geun K.
pros: Even though I lived in US over than 10 years, I was not that great at grammar. But as a graduate student and hospital office manager, it was required to have perfect grammar and Grammarly Business was clear answer for this!
cons: Honestly, sometimes, I don't want to follow the Grammarly suggestion, but it kept showing the suggestions and this was bothering me sometimes.

review_title: A Powerful Tool for Professional Writing
description: Overall, my experience with Grammarly Business has been very positive. It’s made a significant difference in the quality and professionalism of my written communication. The suggestions are helpful, and the customizability allows me to tailor it to my specific needs.
author: Sidney B.
pros: What I love most about Grammarly Business is how it helps me write more accurately. It takes care of everything from grammar and punctuation to ensuring my style stays consistent. The instant feedback is super helpful, and I really appreciate the ability to customize style guides for myself. This way, all my writing reflects my brand's voice and tone beautifully!
cons: The biggest drawback is the price. Grammarly Business is a solid tool, but it can be a little on the expensive side, especially for smaller teams or startups. Plus, while it’s great with grammar and style, it sometimes doesn’t catch context-specific details, which can lead to some quirky suggestions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Cultured Communication -- A Community Manager's Right-Hand Man
description: My overall experience with Grammarly Business has been positive. It streamlined our content review process, ensuring that everything we put out—whether internal or external—was polished and professional. As the community engagement manager, I especially appreciated how it helped maintain consistency in our communications across the board. The tool saved us time and reduced errors, though we still had to make sure it aligned with our brand’s unique voice. Overall, it was a valuable asset that enhanced the quality of our writing while allowing us to stay authentic to our community.
author: Kenyatta M.
pros: What I liked most about Grammarly Business was how seamlessly it integrated into our communication process, ensuring that every message we send out is clear, professional, and on-brand. As a community manager for multiple brands, it's crucial for me to maintain a consistent tone and engage with our audience effectively. Grammarly Business helped elevate our team's writing, saving us time while maintaining authenticity, which is key in building trust and fostering a strong sense of community.
cons: What I liked least about Grammarly Business was that while it's great for catching general grammar issues, it sometimes suggested changes that didn't quite align with the tone or voice we use in our community engagement efforts. In some cases, it would recommend more formal wording when we intentionally want to keep things casual and approachable. It's useful, but we had to double-check certain suggestions to ensure they fit our brand’s personality and vibe.

review_title: Amazing writing helper.
description: I really love this tool! Whether I'm writing a Slack message, an email, or editing a document or LinkedIn post, the little G bubble helps me with grammar, punctuation, and tone. I can rely on it to ensure that whatever I write will be high quality.
author: Aleksandra P.
pros: Since English isn’t my first language, I know my writing isn’t always spot on. That’s why I love having Grammarly around! It helps me make sure my tone feels just right and keeps my writing clear and polished. This really boosts my confidence in sounding professional and ensures I'm not sending stuff plagued with mistakes.
cons: I truly wish it could offer the same level of support for other languages as well. It would make such a difference.
